sourceTitle: GeoNames Syrian Arab Republic Gazetteer Extract

rawFiles.name: imports/raw/2026-06-27-districts/geonames-sy-adm2-records.tsv
rawFiles.notes: Filtered SY.txt rows where feature class is A and feature code is ADM2.

rawFiles.name: imports/raw/2026-06-27-districts/normalized-district-records.json
rawFiles.notes: Local normalized district records after source matching and review cleanup.

transforms: Filtered GeoNames Syria dump to ADM2 administrative records.
Mapped GeoNames admin1 codes to existing OpenSyria governorate IDs.
Removed English administrative suffixes such as District from canonical names.
Used GeoNames latitude and longitude as seed representative centroids.
Used Arabic names from GeoNames where Wikidata did not provide a suitable Arabic label.
reviewNotes: Seeded 61 district records from GeoNames ADM2 features. GeoNames population values were not imported because they are mostly zero or undated in the dump.
